heading: Optimizing global clinical trials
label: 360bbb–8a Optimizing global clinical trials

children.text: work with other regulatory authorities of similar standing, medical research companies, and international organizations to foster and encourage uniform, scientifically driven clinical trial standards with respect to medical products around the world; and

children.label: B
children.text: facilitate the use of foreign data; and

children.label: C
children.text: minimize the need to conduct duplicative clinical studies, preclinical studies, or nonclinical studies.

children.heading: Medical product
children.label: b Medical product
children.text: In this section, the term “medical product” means a drug, as defined in subsection (g) of , a device, as defined in subsection (h) of such section, or a biological product, as defined in section 351(i) of the Public Health Service Act [].section 321 of this title42 U.S.C. 262(i)

children.heading: Savings clause
children.label: c Savings clause
children.text: Nothing in this section shall alter the criteria for evaluating the safety or effectiveness of a medical product under this chapter or under the Public Health Service Act [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 201
